paper_title: PIPA: Preference Alignment as Prior-Informed Statistical Estimation

methodology.name: Prior-Informed Preference Alignment (PIPA)
methodology.approach: Maximum likelihood estimation (MLE) with prior constraints

relationships_to_existing_methods.DPO: Special case of PIPA with specific prior information and loss
relationships_to_existing_methods.KTO: Special case of PIPA with different prior information and loss

advantages: Enables test-time search through per-token value estimations
contributions: Formulation of preference alignment as prior-informed conditional probability estimation
Unified framework integrating solutions to various challenges
title: PIPA: Preference Alignment as Prior-Informed Statistical Estimation
